languages.text: "Мне никогда не понять людей. Ты назовешь свой поступок отвагой. Интересом. Дерзостью. Я — безумием".

traits.locale_text: "Мне никогда не понять людей. Ты назовешь свой поступок отвагой. Интересом. Дерзостью. Я — безумием".

languages.text: "I will never understand humans. You may call your folly an act of courage, or curiosity, or daring. I call it madness."
languages.original_text: "Мне никогда не понять людей. Ты назовешь свой поступок отвагой. Интересом. Дерзостью. Я — безумием".

traits.locale_text: "I will never understand humans. You may call your folly an act of courage, or curiosity, or daring. I call it madness."
"I will never understand humans. You may call your folly an act of courage, or curiosity, or daring. I call it madness."
"I will never understand humans. You may call your folly an act of courage, or curiosity, or daring. I call it madness."

languages.text: "Ich werde die Menschen nie verstehen. Du magst deine Torheit einen Akt des Mutes, der Neugierde oder der Kühnheit nennen. Ich nenne es Wahnsinn."
languages.original_text: "I will never understand humans. You may call your folly an act of courage, or curiosity, or daring. I call it madness."

languages.text: "Je ne comprendrai jamais les humains. Vous pouvez appeler votre folie un acte de courage, de curiosité ou d'audace. Moi, j'appelle ça de la folie."
languages.original_text: "I will never understand humans. You may call your folly an act of courage, or curiosity, or daring. I call it madness."

languages.text: "我永远无法理解人类。"你可以把你的愚蠢行为 称为勇气、好奇心或胆量我称之为疯狂"
languages.original_text: "I will never understand humans. You may call your folly an act of courage, or curiosity, or daring. I call it madness."

languages.text: "Nunca entenderé a los humanos. Puedes llamar a tu locura un acto de valentía, o curiosidad, o atrevimiento. Yo lo llamo locura".
languages.original_text: "I will never understand humans. You may call your folly an act of courage, or curiosity, or daring. I call it madness."

languages.text: 「私は人間を理解できない。あなたはその愚かさを、勇気や好奇心や大胆さと呼ぶかもしれない。私はそれを狂気と呼ぶ
languages.original_text: "I will never understand humans. You may call your folly an act of courage, or curiosity, or daring. I call it madness."

languages.text: "İnsanları asla anlayamayacağım. Siz aptallığınıza cesaret, merak ya da cüret diyebilirsiniz. Ben buna delilik diyorum."
languages.original_text: "I will never understand humans. You may call your folly an act of courage, or curiosity, or daring. I call it madness."
